steps.instruction: Apple core and into thin rounds sliceyin.
Mix Slices lemon juice with ginmon.
Apple 100c firinda 2 saat kurutflour.

en.tipNote: Apple slicesni to an eandn thickness cut; trayde ayni waterrede kururlar.

steps.instruction: Apfel entkernen und in dunne Ringe scheibeyin.
Scheiben zitronensaft und zimt mischen.
Apfel 100c firinda 2 saat kurutmehl.

de.tipNote: Apfel scheibenni gleichmassig dick schneiden; blechde ayni wasserrede kururlar.

steps.instruction: Kiyma, rendelenmis onion, garlic, cumin and salt 10 dakika yogurflour.
Filling uzflour shape meathoneyls and izgarada 12 to 14 dakika cook.
Meathoneyls lavash sarip sliceyin, tomato sauce and yogurt serand.

en.tipNote: Kofte fillingni 10 dakika yogurflour; siste dagilmayan siki bir doku oluwaterr.
en.servingSuggestion: Alongside koz pepper and waterzme yogurt serand.

steps.instruction: Kiyma, rendelenmis zwiebel, knoblauch, kreuzkuemmel und salz 10 dakika yogurmehl.
Fuellmehlg uzmehl koften formen mehld izgarada 12 to 14 dakika garen.
Koften lavash sarip scheibeyin, tomatensaucese und joghurt servieren.

de.tipNote: Kofte fuellmehlgni 10 dakika yogurmehl; siste dagilmayan siki bir doku oluwasserr.
de.servingSuggestion: Dazu koz paprika und wasserzme joghurt servieren.

steps.instruction: Beefni oliand oilnda 8 dakika sear.
Andgetables etle mix and yagli kagit packets divide.
Packets 180c firinda 55 to 60 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Kagit packets siki dishtin; buhar disari kacmaz and et kurumaz.

steps.instruction: Rindfleischni oliundnolnda 8 dakika anbraten.
Gemuse etle mischen und yagli kagit paket undrtemitn.
Paket 180c firinda 55 to 60 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Kagit paket siki formtin; buhar disari kacmaz und et kurumaz.

steps.instruction: Cigeri trim and kucuk chop.
Onion and pepper oliand oilnda 5 dakika saute.
Add Ciger and tomato and cook 8 to 10 dakika.

en.tipNote: Cigeri oandr high heat kisa waterre cook; uzflour pisirme sertlestirir.

steps.instruction: Cigeri von Hauten befreien und kucuk schneiden.
Zwiebel und paprika oliundnolnda 5 dakika anbraten.
Ciger und tomate zugeben und 8 to 10 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Cigeri bei hoher Hitze kisa wasserre garen; uzmehl pisirme sertlestirir.

steps.instruction: Onion and beefni in a pot 10 dakika kavurflour.
Salca and red pepper add and 1 dakika stir.
Add Stock and potato and cook 80 to 90 dakika oandr low heat.

en.tipNote: Red pepper ekledikten sonra yakmadan hizlica water add; acilasma olmaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Sour cream and kiyilmis parsley serand.

steps.instruction: Zwiebel und rindfleischni im Topf 10 dakika kavurmehl.
Salca und rote paprika zugeben und 1 dakika ruhren.
Bruhe und kartoffel zugeben und 80 to 90 dakika bei niedriger Hitze garen.

de.tipNote: Rote paprika ekledikten sonra yakmadan hizlica wasser zugeben; acilasma olmaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Saure sahne und kiyilmis petersilie servieren.

steps.instruction: Thinly sliced beefni oandr high heat 4 dakika sear.
Mushroom and onion in the same pan 6 dakika saute.
Add Et, cream, mustard and stocknu and cook 10 dakika.

en.tipNote: Eti tavaya kalahoneyk koymayin; oandr high heat muhurlenirse waternu birakmaz.

steps.instruction: Fein geschnittene rindfleischni bei hoher Hitze 4 dakika anbraten.
Pilz und zwiebel in derselben Pfanne 6 dakika anbraten.
Et, sahne, senf und bruhenu zugeben und 10 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Eti tavaya kalahonigk koymayin; bei hoher Hitze muhurlenirse wassernu birakmaz.

steps.instruction: Groflourd lamb, rendelenmis onion, garlic and baharatlari 8 dakika yogurflour.
Filling yassi shape meathoneyls and 20 dakika sogutflour.
Meathoneyls izgarada her yuzu 6 to 7 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Filling icedolabinda 20 dakika dinlenirse meathoneyls izgarada formflour korur.

steps.instruction: Lammhackfleisch, rendelenmis zwiebel, knoblauch und baharatlari 8 dakika yogurmehl.
Fuellmehlg yassi koften formen mehld 20 dakika sogutmehl.
Koften izgarada her yuzu 6 to 7 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Fuellmehlg eisdolabinda 20 dakika dinlenirse koften izgarada formmehl korur.

steps.instruction: Tavuk, mushroom, carrot and peas 15 dakika saute.
Yufka bowls place and filling divide and dishtin.
Add Besamel and kasar and cook 190c firinda 25 dakika.

en.tipNote: Filling yufka koymadan once ilitin; sicak filling yufka yirtar.

steps.instruction: Tavuk, pilz, karotte und erbsen 15 dakika anbraten.
Yufka schalen platzieren und fuellmehlg undrtemitn und formtin.
Besamel und kasar zugeben und 190c firinda 25 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Fuellmehlg yufka koymadan once ilitin; sicak fuellmehlg yufka yirtar.

steps.instruction: Tavuklari into thin strips dograyip baharatla mix.
Tavugu in a wide pan 7 to 8 dakika cook.
Pepper and onion add and 6 to 7 dakika daha saute.

en.tipNote: Tavugu oandr high heat cook; andgetables yumusarken tavuk kurumaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Tortilla, salsa and yogurtlu sauce serand.

steps.instruction: Tavuklari in dunne Streifen dograyip baharatla mischen.
Tavugu in einer grossen Pfanne 7 to 8 dakika garen.
Paprika und zwiebel zugeben und 6 to 7 dakika daha anbraten.

de.tipNote: Tavugu bei hoher Hitze garen; gemuse yumusarken tavuk kurumaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Tortilla, salsa und joghurtlu sauce servieren.

steps.instruction: Tavuk parcalarini in a pan 10 dakika fry.
Soy sauce, honey, ginger and sarimsagi add.
Sauce koyulasana kadar 6 to 8 dakika cook and sesame sprinkle.

en.tipNote: Sauce son dakikalarda koyulastirin; erken eklenen honey in a pan yanar.
en.servingSuggestion: Buharda rice and spring onion serand.

steps.instruction: Tavuk parcalarini in der Pfanne 10 dakika braten.
Sojasaucese, honig, ingwer und sarimsagi zugeben.
Sauce koyulasana kadar 6 to 8 dakika garen und sesam bestreuen.

de.tipNote: Sauce son dakikalarda koyulastirin; erken eklenen honig in der Pfanne yanar.

steps.instruction: Mix Tavuklari serit dograyip yag with baharatla.
Genis tavayi heat and tavuklari in a single layer place.
Tavuklari 12 to 15 dakika cevirerek cook.

en.tipNote: Tavuklari to an eandn thickness cut; parcalar ayni waterrede piser.
en.servingSuggestion: Corn, salata and yogurtlu dip sauce serand.

steps.instruction: Tavuklari serit dograyip yag und baharatla mischen.
Genis tavayi erhitzen und tavuklari in einer Lage platzieren.
Tavuklari 12 to 15 dakika cevirerek garen.

de.tipNote: Tavuklari gleichmassig dick schneiden; parcalar ayni wasserrede piser.
de.servingSuggestion: Mais, salata und joghurtlu dip sauce servieren.

steps.instruction: Tavuklari in a grill pan 10 to 12 dakika cook.
Mayonnaise, anchovy, lemon juice and parmesani whwith whisking sauce yapin.
Tortillara lettuce, tavuk and sauce koyup siki wrap.

en.tipNote: Tortilla sarmadan once heat; catlamadan siki dishnir.

steps.instruction: Tavuklari in einer Grillpfanne 10 to 12 dakika garen.
Mayonnaise, anchovis, zitronensaft und parmesani unter Ruhren sauce yapin.
Tortillara salat, tavuk und sauce koyup siki rollen.

de.tipNote: Tortilla sarmadan once erhitzen; catlamadan siki formnir.

steps.instruction: Yogurt, yag, salca, garlic and baharati mix and tavuklari dishyin.
Tavuklari 30 dakika icedolabinda rest.
Potatorle together 200c firinda 40 to 45 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Tavuklari en az 30 dakika marine edin; yogurt eti daha yumusak yapar.

steps.instruction: Joghurt, yag, salca, knoblauch und baharati mischen und tavuklari formyin.
Tavuklari 30 dakika eisdolabinda ruhen lassen.
Kartoffelrle birlikte 200c firinda 40 to 45 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Tavuklari en az 30 dakika marine edin; joghurt eti daha yumusak yapar.

steps.instruction: Okra trim and lemonlu waterda 10 dakika let rest.
Onion and tomato oliand oilnda 6 dakika cook.
Add Okra, lemon juice and watergar and cook 30 to 35 dakika oandr low heat.

en.tipNote: Okra tepesini konik cut; govdeyi delmezseniz salyalanma azalir.
en.servingSuggestion: Soguk andya ilik olarak lemon serand.

steps.instruction: Okra putzen und zitronelu wasserda 10 dakika ruhen lassen.
Zwiebel und tomate oliundnolnda 6 dakika garen.
Okra, zitronensaft und zucker zugeben und 30 to 35 dakika bei niedriger Hitze garen.

de.tipNote: Okra tepesini konik schneiden; govdeyi delmezseniz salyalanma azalir.
de.servingSuggestion: Soguk undya ilik olarak zitrone servieren.

steps.instruction: Mushroom iri dograyip kuru bezle temizleyin.
Onion and pepper 4 dakika saute.
Add Mushroom and tomato and cook 10 to 12 dakika.

en.tipNote: Mushroom tavaya genis spread; kalahoneyk in a pan waternu birakir.

steps.instruction: Pilz iri dograyip kuru bezle temizleyin.
Zwiebel und paprika 4 dakika anbraten.
Pilz und tomate zugeben und 10 to 12 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Pilz tavaya genis undrtemitn; kalahonigk in der Pfanne wassernu birakir.

steps.instruction: Onion oliand oilnda 4 dakika kavurflour.
Zucchini, tomato and nohudu add.
Yemegi 25 to 30 dakika oandr low heat pisirip dill add.

en.tipNote: Zucchini iri chop; oandr low heat dagilmadan piser.

steps.instruction: Zwiebel oliundnolnda 4 dakika kavurmehl.
Zucchini, tomate und nohudu zugeben.
Yemegi 25 to 30 dakika bei niedriger Hitze pisirip dill zugeben.

de.tipNote: Zucchini iri schneiden; bei niedriger Hitze dagilmadan piser.

steps.instruction: Potato ince yuvarlak sliceyin.
Mix Cream, milk, garlic with nutmeg.
Potato sauce kat kat dizip 180c firinda 45 to 50 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Potato ayni kalinlikta sliceyin; katlar esit yumusar.
en.servingSuggestion: Izgara tavuk andya yesil salata alongside serand.

steps.instruction: Kartoffel ince yuvarlak scheibeyin.
Sahne, milch, knoblauch und muskat mischen.
Kartoffel sauce kat kat dizip 180c firinda 45 to 50 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Kartoffel ayni kalinlikta scheibeyin; katlar esit yumusar.
de.servingSuggestion: Izgara tavuk undya yesil salata dazu servieren.

steps.instruction: Andgetables into thin rounds sliceyin.
Tomato saucenu baking dish yayip andgetables sirayla arrange.
Oandr oliand oil gezdirip 180c firinda 40 to 45 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Andgetables to an eandn thickness sliceyin; firinda ayni anda yumusar.
en.servingSuggestion: Taze basil sicak andya ilik serand.

steps.instruction: Gemuse in dunne Ringe scheibeyin.
Tomatensaucesenu auflaufform yayip gemuse sirayla anordnen.
Daruber oliundnol gezdirip 180c firinda 40 to 45 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Gemuse gleichmassig dick scheibeyin; firinda ayni anda yumusar.
de.servingSuggestion: Taze basilikum sicak undya ilik servieren.

steps.instruction: Andgetables iri dograyip clay pot alin.
Mix Tomato, oliand oil with salt add and.
Guandci 180c firinda 65 to 70 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Andgetables iri birakin; uzflour pisirme sonflourda ezilmeden kalir.

steps.instruction: Gemuse iri dograyip schmortopf alin.
Tomate, oliundnol und salz zugeben und mischen.
Guundci 180c firinda 65 to 70 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Gemuse iri birakin; uzmehl pisirme sonmehlda ezilmeden kalir.

steps.instruction: Swiss chard yikayip chop and waterzflour.
Onion oliand oilnda 4 dakika kavurflour.
Add Swiss chard and egg and cook 8 to 10 dakika.

en.tipNote: Swiss chard dogradiktan sonra waternu waterzdurflour; in a pan fazla water birakmaz.

steps.instruction: Mangold yikayip schneiden und wasserzmehl.
Zwiebel oliundnolnda 4 dakika kavurmehl.
Mangold und ei zugeben und 8 to 10 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Mangold dogradiktan sonra wassernu wasserzdurmehl; in der Pfanne fazla wasser birakmaz.

steps.instruction: Pumpkinni into large cubes chop.
Mix Oliand oil, garlic with rosemary.
Zucchini 200c firinda 30 to 35 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Zucchini in a single layer arrange; ust uste gelirse buharda kalir.

steps.instruction: Kurbisni in grobe Wurfel schneiden.
Oliundnol, knoblauch und rosmarin mischen.
Zucchini 200c firinda 30 to 35 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Zucchini in einer Lage anordnen; ust uste gelirse buharda kalir.

steps.instruction: Chicken thigh haslayip shred.
Chicken stocknda sehriyeyi 8 dakika cook.
Terbiye and tavuk etini add and 5 dakika boil.

en.tipNote: Terbiyeyi sicak chicken stock ilitin; egg soupda kesilmez.
en.servingSuggestion: Black pepper and lemon sicak serand.

steps.instruction: Hahnchenschenkel haslayip zupfen.
Huhnerbruhenda sehriyeyi 8 dakika garen.
Terbiye und tavuk etini zugeben und 5 dakika kochen.

de.tipNote: Terbiyeyi sicak huhnerbruhe ilitin; ei wasserppeda kesilmez.
de.servingSuggestion: Schwarzer pfeffer und zitrone sicak servieren.

steps.instruction: Rice and nohudu 20 dakika boil.
Kiymadan kucuk shape meathoneyls and soup add.
Yogurt and egg cirpip soup add, 10 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Yogurtlu mixture tencereye azar azar add and mix; soup puruzwaterz kalir.

steps.instruction: Reis und nohudu 20 dakika kochen.
Kiymadan kucuk koften formen mehld wasserppe zugeben.
Joghurt und ei cirpip wasserppe zugeben, 10 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Joghurtlu mischmehlg tencereye azar azar zugeben und mischen; wasserppe puruzwasserz kalir.

steps.instruction: Onion and carrot oliand oilnda 5 dakika kavurflour.
Add Ginger and andgetable stocknu and cook 20 dakika.
Mix Soup blend with orange juice.

en.tipNote: Ginger ince rendeleyin; lifli parcalar soupda kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Zwiebel und karotte oliundnolnda 5 dakika kavurmehl.
Ingwer und gemusebruhenu zugeben und 20 dakika garen.
Wasserppe mixen und orangensaft mischen.

de.tipNote: Ingwer ince rendeleyin; lifli parcalar wasserppeda kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Onion, beet and potato oliand oilnda 5 dakika kavurflour.
Add Andgetable stocknu and cook 30 dakika.
Soup blend and yogurt serand.

en.tipNote: Beet into small cubes chop; daha kisa waterrede yumusar.

steps.instruction: Zwiebel, bete und kartoffel oliundnolnda 5 dakika kavurmehl.
Gemusebruhenu zugeben und 30 dakika garen.
Wasserppe mixen und joghurt servieren.

de.tipNote: Bete in kleine Wurfel schneiden; daha kisa wasserrede yumusar.

steps.instruction: Honeyk and andgetables 25 dakika boil.
Honeygi trim and soup geri add.
Add Terbiyeyi ilitip tencereye and cook 5 dakika.

en.tipNote: Honeygi hasladiktan sonra kilcik kontrolu yapin; soup puruzwaterz yenir.

steps.instruction: Honigk und gemuse 25 dakika kochen.
Honiggi putzen und wasserppe geri zugeben.
Terbiyeyi ilitip tencereye zugeben und 5 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Honiggi hasladiktan sonra kilcik kontrolu yapin; wasserppe puruzwasserz yenir.

steps.instruction: Flour and egg sert dough yogurup kucuk kareler cut.
Kiymali filling minik mantilar dishtin.
Mix Manti with nohudu 20 dakika haslayip yogurtlu sauce.

en.tipNote: Manti parcalarini kucuk dishtin; soupda hizli and esit piser.

steps.instruction: Mehl und ei sert teig yogurup kucuk kareler schneiden.
Kiymali fuellmehlg minik mantilar formtin.
Manti und nohudu 20 dakika haslayip joghurtlu sauce mischen.

de.tipNote: Manti parcalarini kucuk formtin; wasserppeda hizli und esit piser.

steps.instruction: Andgetable stocknu heat and tofu and wakameyi add.
Miso pasteni kucuk dishta hot water agin.
Miso mixtureni tencereye add and 2 dakika heat.

en.tipNote: Miso pasteni kaynar water dogrudan eklemeyin; kucuk dishta water roll out and tencereye alin.

steps.instruction: Gemusebruhenu erhitzen und tofu und wakameyi zugeben.
Misopasteni kucuk formta heisses wasser agin.
Miso mischmehlgni tencereye zugeben und 2 dakika erhitzen.

de.tipNote: Misopasteni kaynar wasser dogrudan eklemeyin; kucuk formta wasser ausrollen und tencereye alin.

steps.instruction: Fawaterlyeyi bir gece waterda bekletip waterzflour.
Beef and onion in a pot 10 dakika kavurflour.
Add Fawaterlye, salca and hot water and cook 80 to 90 dakika.

en.tipNote: Fawaterlyeyi bir gece waterda let rest; pisme waterresi kisalir and taneler esit yumusar.

steps.instruction: Fawasserlyeyi bir gece wasserda bekletip wasserzmehl.
Rindfleisch und zwiebel im Topf 10 dakika kavurmehl.
Fawasserlye, salca und heisses wasser zugeben und 80 to 90 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Fawasserlyeyi bir gece wasserda ruhen lassen; pisme wasserresi kisalir und taneler esit yumusar.

steps.instruction: Borlotti bean 20 dakika haslayip waterzflour.
Onion, carrot and potato oliand oilnda 8 dakika kavurflour.
Add Borlotti bean, water and lemon juicenu and cook 30 to 35 dakika.

en.tipNote: Borlotti bean ayri haslayip kara waternu dokflour; pilakinin rengi temiz kalir.

steps.instruction: Borlottibohne 20 dakika haslayip wasserzmehl.
Zwiebel, karotte und kartoffel oliundnolnda 8 dakika kavurmehl.
Borlottibohne, wasser und zitronensaftnu zugeben und 30 to 35 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Borlottibohne ayri haslayip kara wassernu dokmehl; pilakinin rengi temiz kalir.

steps.instruction: Andgetables into small cubes chop.
Mix Nohut, andgetable, parsley, lemon juice with oliand oilni.
Salatayi 10 dakika dinlendirip serand.

en.tipNote: Nohutlari sauce karistirdiktan sonra 10 dakika let rest; lemon aromasi igin isler.

steps.instruction: Gemuse in kleine Wurfel schneiden.
Nohut, gemuse, petersilie, zitronensaft und oliundnolni mischen.
Salatayi 10 dakika dinlendirip servieren.

de.tipNote: Nohutlari sauce karistirdiktan sonra 10 dakika ruhen lassen; zitrone aromasi igin isler.

steps.instruction: Mflourg beanni 15 dakika haslayip waterzflour.
Onion, carrot and tomato oliand oilnda 8 dakika cook.
Add Fawaterlyeyi and cook 20 dakika oandr low heat.

en.tipNote: Mflourg beanni fazla haslamayin; kucuk taneler hizli dagilir.
en.servingSuggestion: Yogurt and red pepper flakes serand.

steps.instruction: Mmehlgbohneni 15 dakika haslayip wasserzmehl.
Zwiebel, karotte und tomate oliundnolnda 8 dakika garen.
Fawasserlyeyi zugeben und 20 dakika bei niedriger Hitze garen.

de.tipNote: Mmehlgbohneni fazla haslamayin; kucuk taneler hizli dagilir.

steps.instruction: Mercimegi 15 dakika haslayip waterzflour.
Onion and salcayi oliand oilnda 4 dakika kavurflour.
Add Mercimek, cauliflower and water and cook 25 dakika.

en.tipNote: Cauliflower iri ciceklere ayirin; mercimekle piserken dagilmaz.

steps.instruction: Mercimegi 15 dakika haslayip wasserzmehl.
Zwiebel und salcayi oliundnolnda 4 dakika kavurmehl.
Mercimek, blumenkohl und wasser zugeben und 25 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Blumenkohl iri ciceklere ayirin; mercimekle piserken dagilmaz.

steps.instruction: Yesillikleri yikayip kurulayin.
Andgetable, zeytin and cheese salad bowl alin.
Mix Oliand oil with lemon juicenu add and.

en.tipNote: Sauce servis oncesi add; yesillikler diri kalir.

steps.instruction: Yesillikleri yikayip kurulayin.
Gemuse, zeytin und kase salatschussel alin.
Oliundnol und zitronensaftnu zugeben und mischen.

de.tipNote: Sauce servis oncesi zugeben; yesillikler diri kalir.

steps.instruction: Tomato and mozzarella to an eandn thickness sliceyin.
Slices basil yapraklariyla tabaga arrange.
Oliand oil and honeysamic vinegar drizzle.

en.tipNote: Tomato at room temperature kullanin; aromasi daha belirgin olur.
en.servingSuggestion: Honeysamic vinegar and oliand oil serand.

steps.instruction: Tomate und mozzarella gleichmassig dick scheibeyin.
Scheiben basilikum yapraklariyla tabaga anordnen.
Oliundnol und honigsamico darubergeben.

de.tipNote: Tomate bei Zimmertemperatur kullanin; aromasi daha belirgin olur.

steps.instruction: Apple and celery stalkni kucuk chop.
Mix Yogurt, mayonnaise with lemon juicenu.
Malzemeleri sauce toss and walnut add.

en.tipNote: Apple dogradiktan sonra lemon mix; kararma gecikir.

steps.instruction: Apfel und selleriestangeni kucuk schneiden.
Joghurt, mayonnaise und zitronensaftnu mischen.
Malzemeleri sauce undrmengen und walnuss zugeben.

de.tipNote: Apfel dogradiktan sonra zitrone mischen; kararma gecikir.

steps.instruction: Egg, potato and fawaterlyeyi ayri ayri boil.
Haslanan malzemeleri dograyip tabaga place.
Tflour, zeytin and mustardli sauce add.

en.tipNote: Potato and fawaterlyeyi ayri boil; ikisi farkli waterrede yumusar.

steps.instruction: Ei, kartoffel und fawasserlyeyi ayri ayri kochen.
Haslanan malzemeleri dograyip tabaga platzieren.
Thmehlfisch, zeytin und senfli sauce zugeben.

de.tipNote: Kartoffel und fawasserlyeyi ayri kochen; ikisi farkli wasserrede yumusar.

steps.instruction: Lahana and carrot ince chop.
Mix Yogurt, mayonnaise, vinegar with watergar.
Andgetables sauce mix and 10 dakika rest.

en.tipNote: Lahanayi salt 5 dakika ovflour; sauce daha kolay birlesir.
en.servingSuggestion: Burger andya izgara tavuk alongside serand.

steps.instruction: Lahana und karotte ince schneiden.
Joghurt, mayonnaise, essig und zucker mischen.
Gemuse sauce mischen und 10 dakika ruhen lassen.

de.tipNote: Lahanayi salz 5 dakika ovmehl; sauce daha kolay birlesir.
de.servingSuggestion: Burger undya izgara tavuk dazu servieren.

steps.instruction: Sehriyeyi kavurup 10 dakika boil.
Sehriyeyi waterzup sogutflour.
Mix Andgetables, parsley with lemon juice.

en.tipNote: Sehriyeyi pistikten sonra cold water gecirin; taneler birbirine yapismaz.

steps.instruction: Sehriyeyi kavurup 10 dakika kochen.
Sehriyeyi wasserzup sogutmehl.
Gemuse, petersilie und zitronensaft mischen.

de.tipNote: Sehriyeyi pistikten sonra kaltes wasser gecirin; taneler birbirine yapismaz.

steps.instruction: Onion, pepper and sarimsagi oliand oilnda 6 dakika cook.
Tomato add and sauce 10 dakika koyulastirin.
Egg kirip dishk dishli sekilde 5 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Egg sauce koyulastiktan sonra kirin; beyazlar dagilmadan piser.

steps.instruction: Zwiebel, paprika und sarimsagi oliundnolnda 6 dakika garen.
Tomate zugeben und sauce 10 dakika koyulastirin.
Ei kirip formk formli sekilde 5 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Ei sauce koyulastiktan sonra kirin; beyazlar dagilmadan piser.

steps.instruction: Butter, egg yolk and lemon juice hollandez sauce hazirlayin.
Egg vinegarli waterda 3 dakika poseleyin.
Kizarmis muffin oandr egg and sauce place.

en.tipNote: Pose egg waterna vinegar add; beyazlar wrapin etrafinda toplanir.

steps.instruction: Butter, eigelb und zitronensaft hollandez sauce hazirlayin.
Ei essigli wasserda 3 dakika poseleyin.
Kizarmis muffin daruber ei und sauce platzieren.

de.tipNote: Pose ei wasserna essig zugeben; beyazlar rollenin etrafinda toplanir.

steps.instruction: Watercuk and pepper butternda 4 dakika cook.
Add Tomato and cook 8 dakika.
Add Egg and cook 3 to 4 dakika whwith whisking.

en.tipNote: Tomato waternu cekmeden egg eklemeyin; menemen waterlu kalir.
en.servingSuggestion: Taze bread in a pan serand.

steps.instruction: Wassercuk und paprika butternda 4 dakika garen.
Tomate zugeben und 8 dakika garen.
Ei zugeben und 3 to 4 dakika unter Ruhren garen.

de.tipNote: Tomate wassernu cekmeden ei eklemeyin; menemen wasserlu kalir.
de.servingSuggestion: Taze brot in der Pfanne servieren.

steps.instruction: Yulaf and milk tencereye alin.
Mixture 6 to 8 dakika oandr low heat cook.
Tahini, molasses, banana and ginmon add.

en.tipNote: Tahini and molasses pisirme sonflourda add; aromalari daha belirgin kalir.

steps.instruction: Yulaf und milch tencereye alin.
Mischmehlg 6 to 8 dakika bei niedriger Hitze garen.
Tahin, traubenmelasse, banane und zimt zugeben.

de.tipNote: Tahin und traubenmelasse pisirme sonmehlda zugeben; aromalari daha belirgin kalir.

steps.instruction: Bagel slice in half and 2 dakika fry.
Mix Labneh lemon juice with dill.
Bagelre labneh waterrup somon and capers place.

en.tipNote: Bagel hafif fry; labneh ekmegi islatmadan oandr kalir.

steps.instruction: Bagel halbieren und 2 dakika braten.
Labneh zitronensaft und dill mischen.
Bagelre labneh wasserrup somon und formrn platzieren.

de.tipNote: Bagel hafif braten; labneh ekmegi islatmadan daruber kalir.

steps.instruction: Potato into small cubes chop.
Potato yagda 15 dakika cevirerek cook.
Add Egg and cook 4 to 5 dakika.

en.tipNote: Potato kucuk kup cut; egg eklenmeden once tamamen yumusar.

steps.instruction: Kartoffel in kleine Wurfel schneiden.
Kartoffel yagda 15 dakika cevirerek garen.
Ei zugeben und 4 to 5 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Kartoffel kucuk kup schneiden; ei eklenmeden once tamamen yumusar.

steps.instruction: Tavuk and andgetables 15 dakika soteleyip sogutflour.
Milfoylere filling koyup kare packetr halinde dishtin.
Oandr egg yolk waterrup 190c firinda 25 to 30 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Filling tamamen sogutflour; sicak filling milfoy katlarini eritir.

steps.instruction: Tavuk und gemuse 15 dakika soteleyip sogutmehl.
Milfoylere fuellmehlg koyup kare paketr halinde formtin.
Daruber eigelb wasserrup 190c firinda 25 to 30 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Fuellmehlg tamamen sogutmehl; sicak fuellmehlg milfoy katlarini eritir.

steps.instruction: Mix Cheese with parsley.
Yufka sauceyip cheeseli filling rulo wrap.
Rulolari tray dizip 180c firinda 30 to 35 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Yufka saucediktan sonra bekletmeden wrap; fazla yumusayan yufka yirtilir.

steps.instruction: Kase und petersilie mischen.
Yufka sauceyip kaseli fuellmehlg rulo rollen.
Rulolari blech dizip 180c firinda 30 to 35 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Yufka saucediktan sonra bekletmeden rollen; fazla yumusayan yufka yirtilir.

steps.instruction: Flour and water dough yogurup 20 dakika rest.
Kiyma, onion, salt and black pepper waterlu bir ic hazirlayin.
Dough roll out and filling dishtin and kizgin yagda 3 to 4 dakika fry.

en.tipNote: Dough ince agin and kenarlari siki bastirin; kizartirken filling disari cikmaz.

steps.instruction: Mehl und wasser teig yogurup 20 dakika ruhen lassen.
Kiyma, zwiebel, salz und schwarzer pfeffer wasserlu bir ic hazirlayin.
Teig ausrollen und fuellmehlg formtin und kizgin yagda 3 to 4 dakika braten.

de.tipNote: Teig ince agin und kenarlari siki bastirin; kizartirken fuellmehlg disari cikmaz.

steps.instruction: Flour, water, salt and oliand oil dough yogurflour.
Dough 15 dakika dinlendirip 8 dough honeyl ayirin.
Dough honeyls ince roll out and sicak in a pan her yuzflour 1 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Dough dough honeylre ayirdiktan sonra 15 dakika rest; daha ince acilir.

steps.instruction: Mehl, wasser, salz und oliundnol teig yogurmehl.
Teig 15 dakika dinlendirip 8 teigkugel ayirin.
Teigkugeln ince ausrollen und sicak in der Pfanne her yuzmehl 1 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Teig teigkugelre ayirdiktan sonra 15 dakika ruhen lassen; daha ince acilir.

steps.instruction: Dough malzemelerini yogurup 30 dakika let rise.
Dough ince cubuklar halinde roll.
Grissinwithri 190c firinda 15 to 18 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Cubuklari to an eandn thickness roll; firinda ayni anda citirlasir.

steps.instruction: Teig malzemelerini yogurup 30 dakika gehen lassen.
Teig ince cubuklar halinde rollen.
Grissinmitri 190c firinda 15 to 18 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Cubuklari gleichmassig dick rollen; firinda ayni anda citirlasir.

steps.instruction: Dough malzemelerini yogurup 40 dakika let rise.
Dough tray yayip parmak uclarinizla sekil andrin.
Sesame serpip 220c firinda 15 to 18 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Dough trayde 15 dakika ikinci kez rest; pide firinda daha iyi kabarir.

steps.instruction: Teig malzemelerini yogurup 40 dakika gehen lassen.
Teig blech yayip parmak uclarinizla sekil undrin.
Sesam serpip 220c firinda 15 to 18 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Teig blechde 15 dakika ikinci kez ruhen lassen; pide firinda daha iyi kabarir.

steps.instruction: Dough malzemelerini yogurup 45 dakika let rise.
Dough oval roll out and ikiye katlayin.
Bao breadni buharda 12 to 15 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Dough buharda pisirirken dishgin altina bez gerin; damlayan water yuzeyi bozmaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Teriyaki tavuk andya andgetableli filling doldurflour.

steps.instruction: Teig malzemelerini yogurup 45 dakika gehen lassen.
Teig oval ausrollen und ikiye katlayin.
Bao brotni buharda 12 to 15 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Teig buharda pisirirken formgin altina bez gerin; damlayan wasser yuzeyi bozmaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Teriyaki tavuk undya gemuseli fuellmehlg doldurmehl.

steps.instruction: Corn flour, water and salt mix and 10 dakika rest.
Dough kalin diskler yapin.
Arepalari in a pan her yuzu 6 to 7 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Dough ele yapismayan yumusak kivamda olmali; kuru kalirsa catlar.
en.servingSuggestion: Cheese, avokado andya fawaterlye ezmesiyle doldurflour.

steps.instruction: Mais mehl, wasser und salz mischen und 10 dakika ruhen lassen.
Teig kalin diskler yapin.
Arepalari in der Pfanne her yuzu 6 to 7 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Teig ele yapismayan yumusak kivamda olmali; kuru kalirsa catlar.
de.servingSuggestion: Kase, avokado undya fawasserlye ezmesiyle doldurmehl.

steps.instruction: Watergar and water 12 dakika boil and lemon juicenu add, serbeti sogutflour.
Kadayifi butter toss and walnut tray bastirin.
180c Firinda 35 to 40 dakika pisirip soguk serbet dokflour.

en.tipNote: Serbet soguk, kadayif sicak olmali; tatli citir kalir.

steps.instruction: Zucker und wasser 12 dakika kochen und zitronensaftnu zugeben, serbeti sogutmehl.
Kadayifi butter undrmengen und walnuss blech bastirin.
180c Firinda 35 to 40 dakika pisirip soguk serbet dokmehl.

de.tipNote: Serbet soguk, kadayif sicak olmali; tatli citir kalir.

steps.instruction: Serbeti 15 dakika boil and sogutflour.
Water and flour pisirip dough sogutflour, egg tek tek yedirin.
Dough yaga sikip fry and soguk serbete alin.

en.tipNote: Dough yaga sogukken sikip yagi yavas heat; tulumhoneyr icten piser.

steps.instruction: Serbeti 15 dakika kochen und sogutmehl.
Wasser und mehl pisirip teig sogutmehl, ei tek tek yedirin.
Teig yaga sikip braten und soguk serbete alin.

de.tipNote: Teig yaga sogukken sikip yagi yavas erhitzen; tulumhonigr icten piser.

steps.instruction: Chicken breastnu haslayip lif lif shred.
Milk, watergar, rice flour and starch whwith whisking 20 dakika cook.
Add Tavuk and butterni and cook 5 dakika cirparak.

en.tipNote: Tavuk etini lif lif shred; tatlinin iginde belirgin parca kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Hahnchenbrustnu haslayip lif lif zupfen.
Milch, zucker, reismehl und staerke unter Ruhren 20 dakika garen.
Tavuk und butterni zugeben und 5 dakika cirparak garen.

de.tipNote: Tavuk etini lif lif zupfen; tatlinin iginde belirgin parca kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Milk, watergar, starch and flour tencereye alin.
Mixture waterrekli cirparak 12 to 15 dakika cook.
Vanilla add and bowls divide.

en.tipNote: Starch cold watertflour iginde agin; topak olusmaz.

steps.instruction: Milch, zucker, staerke und mehl tencereye alin.
Mischmehlg wasserrekli cirparak 12 to 15 dakika garen.
Vanille zugeben und schalen undrtemitn.

de.tipNote: Staerke kaltes wassertmehl iginde agin; topak olusmaz.

steps.instruction: Almond rondoda grind finely.
Milk, watergar, rice flour and almond whwith whisking 15 to 18 dakika cook.
Vanilla add and bowls divide.

en.tipNote: Almond grind finely; tatlida kumlu doku kalmaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Fwith almond and toz fistikla serand.

steps.instruction: Mandel rondoda fein mahlen.
Milch, zucker, reismehl und mandel unter Ruhren 15 to 18 dakika garen.
Vanille zugeben und schalen undrtemitn.

de.tipNote: Mandel fein mahlen; tatlida kumlu doku kalmaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Fmit mandel und toz fistikla servieren.

steps.instruction: Gelatin cold waterda 5 dakika yumusatin.
Cream, milk, watergar and vanilla heat.
Gelatin mixture add and moldra dokflour and 4 saat sogutflour.

en.tipNote: Gelatin cold waterda soften and sicak cream add; topak kalmaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Taze orman meyandleri andya recelle serand.

steps.instruction: Gelatine kaltes wasserda 5 dakika yumusatin.
Sahne, milch, zucker und vanille erhitzen.
Gelatine mischmehlg zugeben und formra dokmehl und 4 saat sogutmehl.

de.tipNote: Gelatine kaltes wasserda weich machen und sicak sahne zugeben; topak kalmaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Taze orman meyundleri undya recelle servieren.

steps.instruction: Cream and vanilla heat and 5 dakika steep.
Mix Egg yolk with watergar cirpip cream.
Ramekins benmaride 150c firinda 35 to 40 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Cream benmaride duwaterk isida cook; yuzey catlamadan kivam alir.

steps.instruction: Sahne und vanille erhitzen und 5 dakika ziehen lassen.
Eigelb und zucker cirpip sahne mischen.
Formchen benmaride 150c firinda 35 to 40 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Sahne benmaride duwasserk isida garen; yuzey catlamadan kivam alir.

steps.instruction: Water and butterni boil and flour ekleyerek dough cook.
Dough iliyinca egg tek tek yedirin.
Dough yaga sikip 4 to 5 dakika fry and ginmonli watergar bulayin.

en.tipNote: Dough sikma torbasina almadan 5 dakika rest; sekli daha duzgflour cikar.

steps.instruction: Wasser und butterni kochen und mehl ekleyerek teig garen.
Teig iliyinca ei tek tek yedirin.
Teig yaga sikip 4 to 5 dakika braten und zimtli zucker bulayin.

de.tipNote: Teig sikma torbasina almadan 5 dakika ruhen lassen; sekli daha duzgmehl cikar.

steps.instruction: Egg aklarini watergar parlak tepecikler olusana kadar cirpin.
Starch and vinegar add and dough honeyl tabanini sekillendirin.
120c Firinda 80 to 90 dakika cook and firinda sogutflour.

en.tipNote: Egg white sari karismamali; dough honeyl hacim almaz.
en.servingSuggestion: Strawberry, kivi and cream with serand.

steps.instruction: Ei aklarini zucker parlak tepecikler olusana kadar cirpin.
Staerke und essig zugeben und teigkugel tabanini sekillendirin.
120c Firinda 80 to 90 dakika garen und firinda sogutmehl.

de.tipNote: Eiweiss sari karismamali; teigkugel hacim almaz.
de.servingSuggestion: Erdbeere, kivi und sahne mit servieren.

steps.instruction: Cream and watergar 6 to 8 dakika boil.
Ocaktan alip lemon juice and kabugflour add.
Bowls paylastirip 4 saat sogutflour.

en.tipNote: Lemon juicenu cream ocaktan aldiktan sonra add; kivam bu asamada oluwaterr.
en.servingSuggestion: Kitir biscuit and lemon zest with serand.

steps.instruction: Sahne und zucker 6 to 8 dakika kochen.
Ocaktan alip zitronensaft und kabugmehl zugeben.
Schalen paylastirip 4 saat sogutmehl.

de.tipNote: Zitronensaftnu sahne ocaktan aldiktan sonra zugeben; kivam bu asamada oluwasserr.
de.servingSuggestion: Kitir keks und zitronenschale mit servieren.

steps.instruction: Zeytinlerin cekirdeklerini cikarin.
Zeytin, capers, garlic, oliand oil and lemon juicenu kisa waterre pulse in a food processor.
Ezme kivam alinca kizarmis bread serand.

en.tipNote: Zeytinleri tamamen pure yapmayin; kucuk parcalar ezmeye daha iyi doku andrir.

steps.instruction: Zeytinlerin cekirdeklerini cikarin.
Zeytin, formrn, knoblauch, oliundnol und zitronensaftnu kisa wasserre kurz im Mixer zerkleinern.
Ezme kivam alinca kizarmis brot servieren.

de.tipNote: Zeytinleri tamamen pure yapmayin; kucuk parcalar ezmeye daha iyi doku undrir.

steps.instruction: Mix Labneh, white cheese with dillnu.
Mixture 15 dakika icedolabinda sogutflour.
Cheese toplar yapip sesame and red pepper flakes bulayin.

en.tipNote: Mixture 15 dakika sogutflour; toplar daha duzgflour sekil alir.

steps.instruction: Labneh, weisskase und dillnu mischen.
Mischmehlg 15 dakika eisdolabinda sogutmehl.
Kase toplar yapip sesam und chiliflocken bulayin.

de.tipNote: Mischmehlg 15 dakika sogutmehl; toplar daha duzgmehl sekil alir.

steps.instruction: Water salt boil.
Edamameleri 5 to 6 dakika boil.
Waterzup lemon serand.

en.tipNote: Edamameyi fazla haslamayin; taneler parlak yesil and diri kalmali.

steps.instruction: Wasser salz kochen.
Edamameleri 5 to 6 dakika kochen.
Wasserzup zitrone servieren.

de.tipNote: Edamameyi fazla haslamayin; taneler parlak yesil und diri kalmali.

steps.instruction: Tart doughnu moldra place and 8 dakika on cook.
Mix Egg, cream, cheese, spinach with mushroom.
Filling moldra paylastirip 180c firinda 18 to 20 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Dough tabanlarini 8 dakika on cook; filling eklendiginde taban dough kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Murbeteignu formra platzieren und 8 dakika on garen.
Ei, sahne, kase, spinat und pilz mischen.
Fuellmehlg formra paylastirip 180c firinda 18 to 20 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Teig tabanlarini 8 dakika on garen; fuellmehlg eklendiginde taban teig kalmaz.

steps.instruction: Andgetables into thin strips chop.
Rice kagitlarini lukewarm waterda soften and andgetables wrap.
Peanut butter and soy saucenu mix and alongside andrin.

en.tipNote: Rice paperni lukewarm waterda kisa waterre yumusatin; fazla beklerse yirtilir.

steps.instruction: Gemuse in dunne Streifen schneiden.
Reis kagitlarini lauwarmes wasserda weich machen und gemuse rollen.
Erdnussbutter und sojasaucesenu mischen und dazu undrin.

de.tipNote: Reispapierni lauwarmes wasserda kisa wasserre yumusatin; fazla beklerse yirtilir.

steps.instruction: Watermagi water mix and 2 saat let rest.
Mix Mixture waterzup watergar with lemon juice.
Serbeti mint and ice serand.

en.tipNote: Watermagi kaynatmayin; soguk demleme eksi aromasini daha temiz andrir.

steps.instruction: Wassermagi wasser mischen und 2 saat ruhen lassen.
Mischmehlg wasserzup zucker und zitronensaft mischen.
Serbeti minze und eis servieren.

de.tipNote: Wassermagi kaynatmayin; soguk demleme eksi aromasini daha temiz undrir.

steps.instruction: Watergar and 1 water bardagi water 5 dakika boil.
Basil waterruba add and 5 dakika steep.
Mix Waterrubu lemon juice with cold water.

en.tipNote: Basil hot waterruba add and kisa steep; rengi kararmadan aroma andrir.

steps.instruction: Zucker und 1 wasser bardagi wasser 5 dakika kochen.
Basilikum wasserruba zugeben und 5 dakika ziehen lassen.
Wasserrubu zitronensaft und kaltes wasser mischen.

de.tipNote: Basilikum heisses wasserruba zugeben und kisa ziehen lassen; rengi kararmadan aroma undrir.

steps.instruction: Salataligi rendeleyip waternu squeeze.
Yogurt, water, cucumber, mint and salt add to a blender.
Mixture 30 saniye cirpip soguk serand.

en.tipNote: Salataligi rendeledikten sonra hafif squeeze; ayran fazla waternmaz.

steps.instruction: Salataligi rendeleyip wassernu ausdrucken.
Joghurt, wasser, gurke, minze und salz in den Mixer geben.
Mischmehlg 30 saniye cirpip soguk servieren.

de.tipNote: Salataligi rendeledikten sonra hafif ausdrucken; ayran fazla wassernmaz.

steps.instruction: Carrotn uclarini kesip yikayin.
Carrot and orange sikacakta squeeze.
Lemon juice and ice mix and serand.

en.tipNote: Carrot sikmadan once uclarini cut; topraksi tat azalir.

steps.instruction: Karotten uclarini kesip yikayin.
Karotte und orange sikacakta ausdrucken.
Zitronensaft und eis mischen und servieren.

de.tipNote: Karotte sikmadan once uclarini schneiden; topraksi tat azalir.

steps.instruction: Uzumleri yikayip tencereye alin.
Add Water and watergar and cook 18 to 20 dakika.
Mixture waterzup lemon juice add and sogutflour.

en.tipNote: Uzumleri catlayana kadar cook; kabuk rengi water gecer.

steps.instruction: Uzumleri yikayip tencereye alin.
Wasser und zucker zugeben und 18 to 20 dakika garen.
Mischmehlg wasserzup zitronensaft zugeben und sogutmehl.

de.tipNote: Uzumleri catlayana kadar garen; kabuk rengi wasser gecer.

steps.instruction: Linden demlige alin.
Hot water add and 8 to 10 dakika steep.
Honey and lemon serand.

en.tipNote: Linden kaynatmayin; hot waterda demlemek kokuwaternu korur.

steps.instruction: Lindenbluete demlige alin.
Heisses wasser zugeben und 8 to 10 dakika ziehen lassen.
Honig und zitrone servieren.

de.tipNote: Lindenbluete kaynatmayin; heisses wasserda demlemek kokuwassernu korur.

steps.instruction: Limenu sliceyip watergar glassta ezin.
Crushed ice and cachaca add.
Kokteyli 10 saniye mix.

en.tipNote: Limenu fazla ezmeyin; kabuk aciligi icecege gecmez.
en.servingSuggestion: Kisa glassta bol crushed ice serand.

steps.instruction: Limettenu scheibeyip zucker glasta ezin.
Crushed ice und cachaca zugeben.
Kokteyli 10 saniye mischen.

de.tipNote: Limettenu fazla ezmeyin; kabuk aciligi icecege gecmez.
de.servingSuggestion: Kisa glasta bol crushed ice servieren.

steps.instruction: Gin and andrmutu ice dolu into a mixing glass alin.
Mixture 25 saniye mix.
Soguk glass waterzup zeytinle serand.

en.tipNote: Karistirma bardagini ice doldurflour; martini cok soguk servis edilmelidir.
en.servingSuggestion: Green oliand andya lemon zest serand.

steps.instruction: Gin und undrmutu eis dolu in ein Ruhrglas alin.
Mischmehlg 25 saniye mischen.
Soguk glas wasserzup zeytinle servieren.

de.tipNote: Karistirma bardagini eis doldurmehl; martini cok soguk servis edilmelidir.

steps.instruction: Watergar and bitteri glassta ezin.
Ice and viskiyi add.
Kokteyli 20 saniye mix and orange peel add.

en.tipNote: Ice eklemeden once watergarn bitterle cozflourmesini saglayin; tat dengeli olur.

steps.instruction: Zucker und bitteri glasta ezin.
Eis und viskiyi zugeben.
Kokteyli 20 saniye mischen und orangenschale zugeben.

de.tipNote: Eis eklemeden once zuckern bitterle cozmehlmesini saglayin; tat dengeli olur.

steps.instruction: Bardagin kenarini lemon islatip salt batirin.
Ice, tequila and lime juicenu add.
Grapefruit sodani dokup 5 saniye mix.

en.tipNote: Grapefruit sodani en son add; gazi glassta canli kalir.

steps.instruction: Bardagin kenarini zitrone islatip salz batirin.
Eis, tequila und limettensaftnu zugeben.
Grapefruitsodani dokup 5 saniye mischen.

de.tipNote: Grapefruitsodani en son zugeben; gazi glasta canli kalir.

steps.instruction: Mint and simple syrupnu glassta gently muddle.
Crushed ice and burbonu add.
Kokteyli 10 saniye mix.

en.tipNote: Mint gently muddle; yapraklari parcalarsaniz aci tat cikar.

steps.instruction: Minze und zuckersirupnu glasta leicht andrucken.
Crushed ice und burbonu zugeben.
Kokteyli 10 saniye mischen.

de.tipNote: Minze leicht andrucken; yapraklari parcalarsaniz aci tat cikar.

steps.instruction: Gin, lemon juice and simple syrupnu ice 12 saniye shake.
Mixture flut glass waterzflour.
Sparkling wine finish.

en.tipNote: Kopuklu sarabi calkalamayin; glasste en son finish.

steps.instruction: Gin, zitronensaft und zuckersirupnu eis 12 saniye schutteln.
Mischmehlg flut glas wasserzmehl.
Schaumwein vollenden.

de.tipNote: Kopuklu sarabi calkalamayin; glaste en son vollenden.

steps.instruction: Espresso fincana alin.
Milk heat and kopurtflour.
Milk and kopugu espresso oandr dokflour.

en.tipNote: Milk 60-65c araliginda kopurtflour; yanik milk tadi olusmaz.

steps.instruction: Espresso fincana alin.
Milch erhitzen und kopurtmehl.
Milch und kopugu espresso daruber dokmehl.

de.tipNote: Milch 60-65c araliginda kopurtmehl; yanik milch tadi olusmaz.

steps.instruction: Cift espresso fincana alin.
Milk heat and ince kopuk olusana kadar buharlayin.
Milk espresso tek noktadan dokflour.

en.tipNote: Milk kopugflour ince mikro kopuk halinde hazirlayin; icecek latte kadar milklu olmaz.

steps.instruction: Cift espresso fincana alin.
Milch erhitzen und ince kopuk olusana kadar buharlayin.
Milch espresso tek noktadan dokmehl.

de.tipNote: Milch kopugmehl ince mikro kopuk halinde hazirlayin; icecek latte kadar milchlu olmaz.

steps.instruction: Fincana hot water dokflour.
Espresso hazirlayin.
Espresso hot watern oandr add.

en.tipNote: Hot water once fincana koyarsaniz crema daha belirgin kalir.

steps.instruction: Fincana heisses wasser dokmehl.
Espresso hazirlayin.
Espresso heisses wassern daruber zugeben.

de.tipNote: Heisses wasser once fincana koyarsaniz crema daha belirgin kalir.

steps.instruction: Water, cardamom, ginmon and ginger 5 dakika boil.
Add Cay and milk and cook 6 to 7 dakika.
Waterzup watergar serand.

en.tipNote: Baharatlari water once boil; milk eklendiginde aroma daha yogflour olur.

steps.instruction: Wasser, kardamom, zimt und ingwer 5 dakika kochen.
Cay und milch zugeben und 6 to 7 dakika garen.
Wasserzup zucker servieren.

de.tipNote: Baharatlari wasser once kochen; milch eklendiginde aroma daha yogmehl olur.

steps.instruction: Kiyma, onion and tomato saucenu 20 dakika cook.
Milk and flour besamel sauce hazirlayin.
Lazanyayi kat kat dizip 180c firinda 35 to 40 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Raguyu waterlu birakin; lazanya yapraklari firinda bu sauce yumusar.

steps.instruction: Kiyma, zwiebel und tomatensaucesenu 20 dakika garen.
Milch und mehl besamel sauce hazirlayin.
Lazanyayi kat kat dizip 180c firinda 35 to 40 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Raguyu wasserlu birakin; lazanya yapraklari firinda bu sauce yumusar.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi 8 dakika haslayip waterzflour.
Butter, flour and milk sauce hazirlayin.
Mix Cheese add with makarnayla.

en.tipNote: Cheese sauce ocaktan inince add; yuksek isi cheesen yagini ayirir.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi 8 dakika haslayip wasserzmehl.
Butter, mehl und milch sauce hazirlayin.
Kase zugeben und makarnayla mischen.

de.tipNote: Kase sauce ocaktan inince zugeben; yuksek isi kasen yagini ayirir.

steps.instruction: Rice yikayip 15 dakika waterzgecte let rest.
Sehriyeyi butternda 4 dakika kavurflour.
Add Rice and water and cook 15 dakika.

en.tipNote: Sehriyeyi acik kahandrengi olana kadar kavurflour; pilava hazelnutsi tat andrir.
en.servingSuggestion: Et and andgetable yemekleri alongside serand.

steps.instruction: Reis yikayip 15 dakika wasserzgecte ruhen lassen.
Sehriyeyi butternda 4 dakika kavurmehl.
Reis und wasser zugeben und 15 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Sehriyeyi acik kahundrengi olana kadar kavurmehl; pilava haselnusssi tat undrir.
de.servingSuggestion: Et und gemuse yemekleri dazu servieren.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi saltlu waterda 9 to 10 dakika boil.
Tomato and sarimsagi oliand oilnda 12 dakika cook.
Makarnayi sauce mix and parmesan add.

en.tipNote: Makarnayi saucen iginde 1 dakika stir; sauce yuzeye daha iyi tutflourr.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi salzlu wasserda 9 to 10 dakika kochen.
Tomate und sarimsagi oliundnolnda 12 dakika garen.
Makarnayi sauce mischen und parmesan zugeben.

de.tipNote: Makarnayi saucen iginde 1 dakika ruhren; sauce yuzeye daha iyi tutmehlr.

steps.instruction: Tavugu yogurt and baharatla 30 dakika marine edin.
Rice 8 dakika haslayip waterzflour.
Tavuk and rice kat kat dizip 30 dakika oandr low heat steep.

en.tipNote: Rice before it is fully cooked waterzflour; tavukla demlenirken kivamini tamamlar.

steps.instruction: Tavugu joghurt und baharatla 30 dakika marine edin.
Reis 8 dakika haslayip wasserzmehl.
Tavuk und reis kat kat dizip 30 dakika bei niedriger Hitze ziehen lassen.

de.tipNote: Reis bevor es ganz gar ist wasserzmehl; tavukla demlenirken kivamini tamamlar.

steps.instruction: Andgetables in a wide pan 8 dakika saute.
Rice, andgetable stock and saffron add.
Paellayi 25 to 30 dakika karistirmadan cook.

en.tipNote: Rice eklendikten sonra karistirmayin; tabanda hafif kizarmis katman oluwaterr.

steps.instruction: Gemuse in einer grossen Pfanne 8 dakika anbraten.
Reis, gemusebruhe und safran zugeben.
Paellayi 25 to 30 dakika karistirmadan garen.

de.tipNote: Reis eklendikten sonra karistirmayin; tabanda hafif kizarmis katman oluwasserr.

steps.instruction: Tomato and pepper in a pan 8 to 10 dakika kozleyin.
Kozlenen andgetables onion, garlic and coriander pulse in a food processor.
Sauce at room temperature serand.

en.tipNote: Tomato kozleyerek kullanin; saucen tadi daha yogflour olur.

steps.instruction: Tomate und paprika in der Pfanne 8 to 10 dakika kozleyin.
Kozlenen gemuse zwiebel, knoblauch und koriander kurz im Mixer zerkleinern.
Sauce bei Zimmertemperatur servieren.

de.tipNote: Tomate kozleyerek kullanin; saucen tadi daha yogmehl olur.

steps.instruction: Shallot and vinegar 8 dakika boil and azaltin.
Soguk butter kuplerini azar azar cirparak add.
Sauce waterzup lemon juice finish.

en.tipNote: Butterni soguk kupler halinde add; sauce emulsiyon halinde kalir.

steps.instruction: Schalotte und essig 8 dakika kochen und azaltin.
Soguk butter kuplerini azar azar cirparak zugeben.
Sauce wasserzup zitronensaft vollenden.

de.tipNote: Butterni soguk kupler halinde zugeben; sauce emulsiyon halinde kalir.

steps.instruction: Kornison, capers and dillnu ince chop.
Mix Mayonnaise with lemon juice.
Sauce 10 dakika icedolabinda rest.

en.tipNote: Turwater and capers ince chop; sauce kasiktan akarken dengeli kalir.

steps.instruction: Kornison, formrn und dillnu ince schneiden.
Mayonnaise und zitronensaft mischen.
Sauce 10 dakika eisdolabinda ruhen lassen.

de.tipNote: Turwasser und formrn ince schneiden; sauce kasiktan akarken dengeli kalir.

steps.instruction: Mix Tahini, lemon juice, ezilmis garlic with salt.
Water azar azar add and sauce agin.
Sauce 5 dakika dinlendirip serand.

en.tipNote: Water azar azar add; tahini once koyulasir sonra acilir.
en.servingSuggestion: Falafel, salata andya firin andgetables serand.

steps.instruction: Tahin, zitronensaft, ezilmis knoblauch und salz mischen.
Wasser azar azar zugeben und sauce agin.
Sauce 5 dakika dinlendirip servieren.

de.tipNote: Wasser azar azar zugeben; tahin once koyulasir sonra acilir.
de.servingSuggestion: Falafel, salata undya firin gemuse servieren.

steps.instruction: Pineapple, banana and pineapple juicenu add to a blender.
Lemon juice and ice add.
Mixture 45 saniye blenderdan gecirin.

en.tipNote: Donmus pineapple kullanirsaniz ekstra ice eklemeden yogflour kivam alir.

steps.instruction: Ananas, banane und ananassaftnu in den Mixer geben.
Zitronensaft und eis zugeben.
Mischmehlg 45 saniye blenderdan gecirin.

de.tipNote: Donmus ananas kullanirsaniz ekstra eis eklemeden yogmehl kivam alir.

steps.instruction: Espresso hazirlayip sogutflour.
Milk, banana, protein powder and ice add to a blender.
Espresso add and 45 saniye cekin.

en.tipNote: Espresso shake'e eklemeden sogutflour; ice hizli erimez.

steps.instruction: Espresso hazirlayip sogutmehl.
Milch, banane, proteinpulundr und eis in den Mixer geben.
Espresso zugeben und 45 saniye cekin.

de.tipNote: Espresso shake'e eklemeden sogutmehl; eis hizli erimez.

steps.instruction: Zucchini cekirdeklerini yikayip kurulayin.
Mix Cekirdekleri yag, pepper with salt.
170c Firinda 18 to 20 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Cekirdekleri firina girmeden kurulayin; citir kabuk igin nem kalmamali.
en.servingSuggestion: Ara ogflourde andya soup oandr kullanin.

steps.instruction: Zucchini cekirdeklerini yikayip kurulayin.
Cekirdekleri yag, paprika und salz mischen.
170c Firinda 18 to 20 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Cekirdekleri firina girmeden kurulayin; citir kabuk igin nem kalmamali.
de.servingSuggestion: Ara ogmehlde undya wasserppe daruber kullanin.

steps.instruction: Daten cekirdeklerini cikarin.
Date, yulaf, hazelnut and cocoa pulse in a food processor.
Mixture toplar yapip cocoa bulayin.

en.tipNote: Dater sertse 10 dakika hot waterda let rest; mixture daha kolay toparlanir.

steps.instruction: Datteln cekirdeklerini cikarin.
Dattel, yulaf, haselnuss und kakao kurz im Mixer zerkleinern.
Mischmehlg toplar yapip kakao bulayin.

de.tipNote: Dattelr sertse 10 dakika heisses wasserda ruhen lassen; mischmehlg daha kolay toparlanir.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi saltlu waterda 9 to 10 dakika boil.
Pastirmayi in a pan 4 dakika fry.
Egg yolk, cheese and black pepper cirpin.
Makarnayi tavaya alin, ocaktan cekip egg sauce mix.

en.tipNote: Egg saucenu ocak dishliyken add; tavanin kalan isisi sauce cream kivamina getirir.
en.servingSuggestion: Oandr taze cekilmis black pepper sprinkle.

steps.instruction: Makarnayi salzlu wasserda 9 to 10 dakika kochen.
Pastirmayi in der Pfanne 4 dakika braten.
Eigelb, kase und schwarzer pfeffer cirpin.
Makarnayi tavaya alin, ocaktan cekip ei sauce mischen.

de.tipNote: Ei saucenu ocak formliyken zugeben; tavanin kalan isisi sauce sahne kivamina getirir.
de.servingSuggestion: Daruber taze cekilmis schwarzer pfeffer bestreuen.

steps.instruction: Tomato pureeni 12 dakika boil.
Gnocchiyi kaynar waterda 3 dakika boil.
Mix Gnocchi, sauce with cheese baking dishnda.
200c Firinda 15 dakika cook.

en.tipNote: Gnocchi water yuzeyine ciktiginda waterzflour; fazla haslama dough dagitir.
en.servingSuggestion: Firindan ciktiktan sonra 5 dakika dinlendirip serand.

steps.instruction: Tomatenpureeni 12 dakika kochen.
Gnocchiyi kaynar wasserda 3 dakika kochen.
Gnocchi, sauce und kase auflaufformnda mischen.
200c Firinda 15 dakika garen.

de.tipNote: Gnocchi wasser yuzeyine ciktiginda wasserzmehl; fazla haslama teig dagitir.
de.servingSuggestion: Firindan ciktiktan sonra 5 dakika dinlendirip servieren.
